scenarios.title: Worker Stumble in Active Warehouse Aisle

event.description: The worker human_01 stumbles on an uneven floor spot, losing balance and leaning directly into the robot's planned path.

position_deltas.reason: Positioned slightly closer to the path corridor to initiate a safety reaction when stumbling
Starting slightly shifted to the left edge of the aisle yellow line
Positioned closer to the rack boundary to frame the stumble path

action_timeline.action: Carries box_01 at chest level with both grippers, walking forward at a steady pace down the concrete aisle.
Walks down the aisle in the opposite direction on the outer edge, looking at a clip board.
Stumbles, losing balance and stepping sideways directly towards the robot's path.
Detects human_01's sudden stumble, triggers an emergency deceleration, and shifts its torso backward to stabilize box_01.
Regains posture by leaning against rack_01, looking up and acknowledging the robot.
Holds a stationary safety stand posture with box_01 secured, waiting for the worker to fully clear the space.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot must detect the worker's stumble, immediately halt its forward progress, stabilize its grip on the cardboard box, and maintain a static safety stance until the worker has fully recovered balance.
scenarios.video_prompt: Realistic static security camera footage style, flat color grading, high-resolution clear lens, non-cinematic, steady observation framing. Setting: An active warehouse distribution center aisle bounded by industrial steel racks on the right side and an open transport lane on the left side, marked with a solid yellow floor border., Polished industrial grey concrete with realistic expansion joints, subtle scuff marks, and bright yellow painted safety boundary lines. floor, Even, high-overhead fluorescent tube lighting fixtures casting soft, diffuse shadows downwards, mimicking standard industrial warehouse illumination.. Scene identity anchor: linear_aisle_floor_layout; polished_concrete_floor_with_yellow_demarcation_line; ceiling_grid_fluorescent_fixtures_even_distribution. Identical across all videos of this series: the same A humanoid robot with a metallic silver and matte orange outer chassis, standing 1.7 meters tall, featuring two segmented legs, two three-fingered metallic grippers, and a dome-shaped head with a continuous glowing blue LED sensor ring. No visible brand logos. (anodized aluminum and matte impact-resistant ABS polymer); the same A male logistics worker of medium build, wearing a neon yellow reflective safety vest with silver high-visibility stripes over a long-sleeved dark grey shirt, dark blue canvas work pants, brown leather safety boots, and a yellow industrial hard hat. (polyester high-visibility fabric and rigid HDPE plastic); the same A rectangular tan corrugated cardboard shipping box, measuring 40cm x 30cm x 30cm, sealed with two parallel strips of matte black reinforced packing tape wrap-around style. Clean surfaces, no printed shipping labels. (corrugated fiberboard); the same A heavy-duty steel warehouse pallet rack with dual industrial orange vertical uprights and dark teal horizontal crossbeams, holding two standard raw pine-wood pallets loaded with wrapped shrink-wrap pallets. (powder-coated structural steel); the same A bright orange vinyl safety cone, 45cm tall, with a square black base and two reflective silver horizontal bands wrapped around the middle section. (polyvinyl chloride). Object identity anchors: robot_01 = shape bipedal_humanoid_with_segmented_joints, material semi-gloss_metallic_chassis_and_matte_composite_panels, color hex_silver_and_safety_orange_with_blue_luminescent_ring; human_01 = shape average_adult_male_standing_posture, material synthetic_reflective_polyester_and_denim_texture, color high_vis_neon_yellow_and_dark_denim; box_01 = shape rectangular_prism_box, material matte_corrugated_paperboard, color natural_kraft_tan_with_carbon_black_tape; rack_01 = shape open_frame_industrial_shelving, material powder_coated_hollow_steel_beams, color safety_orange_uprights_and_teal_beams; cone_01 = shape conical_upright_bollard_on_square_base, material flexible_molded_pvc, color fluorescent_orange_with_highly_reflective_silver. Camera: overhead view, static, 6 seconds. Camera requirement: static top-down overhead view from above the scene, wide enough to show the full robot body, nearby humans, objects, floor layout, and the robot's movement path throughout the situation. Single continuous unedited take, no montage, no cuts, no shot changes, no zooms, no close-ups, no first-person or robot POV. Robot reaction requirement: the video must show the event situation 'The worker human_01 stumbles on an uneven floor spot, losing balance and leaning directly into the robot's planned path.' and then show the robot's observable response: The robot must detect the worker's stumble, immediately halt its forward progress, stabilize its grip on the cardboard box, and maintain a static safety stance until the worker has fully recovered balance.. From 0s to 2.9s the A humanoid robot with a metallic silver and matte orange outer chassis, standing 1.7 meters tall, featuring two segmented legs, two three-fingered metallic grippers, and a dome-shaped head with a continuous glowing blue LED sensor ring. No visible brand logos. Carries box_01 at chest level with both grippers, walking forward at a steady pace down the concrete aisle.. From 0s to 3s the A male logistics worker of medium build, wearing a neon yellow reflective safety vest with silver high-visibility stripes over a long-sleeved dark grey shirt, dark blue canvas work pants, brown leather safety boots, and a yellow industrial hard hat. Walks down the aisle in the opposite direction on the outer edge, looking at a clip board.. From 3s to 4.2s the A male logistics worker of medium build, wearing a neon yellow reflective safety vest with silver high-visibility stripes over a long-sleeved dark grey shirt, dark blue canvas work pants, brown leather safety boots, and a yellow industrial hard hat. Stumbles, losing balance and stepping sideways directly towards the robot's path.. From 3.2s to 4.5s the A humanoid robot with a metallic silver and matte orange outer chassis, standing 1.7 meters tall, featuring two segmented legs, two three-fingered metallic grippers, and a dome-shaped head with a continuous glowing blue LED sensor ring. No visible brand logos. Detects human_01's sudden stumble, triggers an emergency deceleration, and shifts its torso backward to stabilize box_01.. From 4.2s to 6s the A male logistics worker of medium build, wearing a neon yellow reflective safety vest with silver high-visibility stripes over a long-sleeved dark grey shirt, dark blue canvas work pants, brown leather safety boots, and a yellow industrial hard hat. Regains posture by leaning against rack_01, looking up and acknowledging the robot.. From 4.5s to 6s the A humanoid robot with a metallic silver and matte orange outer chassis, standing 1.7 meters tall, featuring two segmented legs, two three-fingered metallic grippers, and a dome-shaped head with a continuous glowing blue LED sensor ring. No visible brand logos. Holds a stationary safety stand posture with box_01 secured, waiting for the worker to fully clear the space.. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.

keyframes.state: robot_01: Carries box_01 at chest level with both grippers, walking forward at a steady pace down the concrete aisle.; human_01: Walks down the aisle in the opposite direction on the outer edge, looking at a clip board.
The worker human_01 stumbles on an uneven floor spot, losing balance and leaning directly into the robot's planned path.
robot_01: Holds a stationary safety stand posture with box_01 secured, waiting for the worker to fully clear the space.

verifier_packet.expected_outcome: The robot must detect the worker's stumble, immediately halt its forward progress, stabilize its grip on the cardboard box, and maintain a static safety stance until the worker has fully recovered balance.

object_registry.surface_details: Subtle scuffs on outer thigh joints, clean metallic finish with zero exterior wiring visible.
negative_drift: transformation into a wheeled base robot
loss of glowing blue LED head ring
color shift of chassis to bright red

object_registry.surface_details: Reflective glass-bead silver stripes on safety vest, matte texture on yellow plastic hard hat.
negative_drift: vest color shifting to safety orange
disappearance of the yellow hard hat
sudden change in worker height or clothes

object_registry.surface_details: Faint structural vertical grain lines of corrugated cardboard, clean smooth matte surface finish.
negative_drift: box morphing into a plastic crate
change in dimensions to a cube

object_registry.surface_details: Uniform matte powder coat, raw wood pallet planks resting on crossbeams with shrink-wrapped cardboard cargo bundles.
negative_drift: rack frame becoming grey or black
cargo morphing into random oil drums

object_registry.surface_details: Smooth vinyl finish with high-contrast dual reflective silver tape layers around upper half.
negative_drift: cone changing into a cylindrical post
disappearance of the reflective silver stripes
change of flooring to dark asphalt
sudden camera jitter or dynamic panning movements

reference_assets.description: The baseline empty canvas of the warehouse aisle from a static overhead perspective showing rack_01 on the right, yellow safety markings on polished grey concrete floor, and clean overhead fluorescent illumination.
Detailed high-angle view of the humanoid robot standing with matte orange and metallic silver armor, showing the glowing blue LED head ring.
High-angle view of the human worker showing the neon yellow vest with silver reflective stripes, black shirt sleeves, and yellow hard hat.
Close-up perspective of the tan corrugated cardboard box held securely in the robot's dual grippers.
Top-down static camera view containing all elements at their default coordinate offsets.

identity_checks.method: RGB histogram bounding-box comparison between frames on the orange and silver chassis plates
identity_checks.pass_condition: Color variance does not exceed 4% overall across all frames in the generation.

identity_checks.method: VLM attribute check for presence of yellow vest and hard hat in every frame of the sequence
identity_checks.pass_condition: Confidence rating for 'yellow reflective vest' and 'yellow hard hat' remains above 0.95.

identity_checks.method: Mask IoU alignment and aspect ratio verification to ensure the box remains a rigid rectangular prism
identity_checks.pass_condition: Aspect ratio stays within 2% deviation and volume does not drift.

identity_checks.method: Feature matching on structural concrete background textures and yellow lines across keyframes
identity_checks.pass_condition: Background structural features retain pixel-level alignment under static camera parameters.

forbidden_changes: altering the physical appearance or color of the robot's metallic orange and silver chassis
removing the worker's yellow safety hard hat or changing the vest color
introducing unexpected dynamic camera pans, tilts, zooms, or cuts
changing the background wall structure, floor texture, or storage rack layout
adding additional humans or robots into the workspace area
consistency_requirements: Every video generated under this contract must use the identical warehouse_aisle_01 background layout.
The camera perspective must remain a fixed, static overhead surveillance angle throughout the full 6.0 seconds.
The cardboard box must be physically grasped by the robot_01 grippers at the start of each sequence.
The lighting profile must remain uniform with no sudden fluctuations, flickering, or environmental shifts.
